title: itertools -- Extra Iterator Adaptors
description: Extends Rust's standard Iterator trait with many additional methods: chunking, deduplication, combinations, permutations, interleaving, joining, grouping, and much more. An essential utility crate for data processing.

commonPatterns.title: Group consecutive elements
Deduplicate and sort
Cartesian product
Interleave two iterators
Fold results (collect first error)

whenToUse: Whenever you need iterator operations beyond what std provides: grouping, chunking, combinations, permutations, multi-iterator zipping, sorted/dedup, or formatted joining.
alternatives: Most methods have manual implementations using std iterators, but itertools is more concise and tested. For parallel iteration: rayon. For streaming/async iteration: tokio-stream, futures::stream.
